---
title: "Home"
image: img/foto_perfil.jpg
about: 
  template: trestles
  image-width: 10em
  links:
    - href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/matheus-carrijo-de-brito-1287539b
      icon: github
      text: LinkedIn
    - href: https://twitter.com/CarrijoBrito
      icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
---

-   **Welcome**

    -   Hello! I'm a Phd Canditade at the São Paulo Business School of Economics (FGV-EESP). I am a financial economist interest in empirical asset pricing and behavior finance with focus on retail investors. Prior to my Phd I've done the Master at FGV-EESP and have a bachelor degree in economics by the University of São Paulo - Ribeirao Preto (FEARP).

-   **Awards**

    -   Best Paper In Finance Award - SBE (2024)
    -   Runner-UP FGC Prize in EBFIN (2024)
    -   Capes Fellowship (2020-2024)
    -   Fapesp Fellowship (2024-2026)

-   **Research Interests**

    -   Asset Pricing, Empirical Asset Pricing and Behavior Finance.

**Contacts:** matheuscarrijobrito\@outlook.com/matheus.brito\@fgv.edu.br
